page.title: Category:All Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation

revision.comment: Added RandomInCategory button
1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (4 members)
Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:Monthly clean-up category (Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation) counter]]
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with 4 members
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Uncategorized categories
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "]].↵" to " "
Adding [[Category:undo 2]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Removing from [[Category:Undo 2]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵}}" to ""
adding dummy category to make categories work
revision.text:
==Old Content== {{Wikipedia category|hidden=yes}} {{polluted category}} {{Tracking category}} This is a category to help keep count of the total number of articles with the {{tl|Rough translation}} template. They should all be in one of the dated categories. See also [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation {{Random page in category}}
==Categories==
[[en:Category:All Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation]] [[Category:categories missing wikidata]]
[[Category:categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation| ]] [[Category:pages]]

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
==Old Content== {{Wikipedia category|hidden=yes}} {{polluted category}} {{Tracking category}} This is a category to help keep count of the total number of articles with the {{tl|Rough translation}} template. They should all be in one of the dated categories. See also [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation {{Random page in category}}
==Categories==
[[en:Category:All Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation]] [[Category:categories missing wikidata]]
[[Category:categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation| ]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Categories]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
revision.text:
==Old Content== {{Wikipedia category|hidden=yes}} {{polluted category}} {{Tracking category}} This is a category to help keep count of the total number of articles with the {{tl|Rough translation}} template. They should all be in one of the dated categories. See also [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation {{Random page in category}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata old]]"
revision.text:
==Old Content== {{Wikipedia category|hidden=yes}} {{polluted category}} {{Tracking category}} This is a category to help keep count of the total number of articles with the {{tl|Rough translation}} template. They should all be in one of the dated categories. See also [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation {{Random page in category}}
==Categories==
[[en:Category:All Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata old]]
[[Category:Categories missing wikidata old]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation| ]] [[Category:Categories]] [[Category:Categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q119440257)
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Qq old]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Wikipedia category|hidden=yes}}
{{polluted category}}
{{Tracking category}}
{{tl|Rough translation}}
{{Random page in category}}
{{wikidata link|Q119440257}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:All Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]
[[Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation| ]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=All_Wikipedia_articles_needing_cleanup_after_translation here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
